subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is meet for the Creator of the world, Who through His all-encompassing grace and penetrating Will hath called forth creation from nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خالق عالم را لایق و سزاست که بعنایت محیطه و اراده نافذه خلق را از عدم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @creation of the world
